message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

actor Admin #9FA8DA
participant "Games Interface" as GI #C5CAE9
database Database #B39DDB
control GamesController #CE93D8


Admin -> GI : CRUD games\nInput game info 
activate GI 

GI->Database: Send request to server \nQuery DB  
deactivate GI  

alt success case   
    note right of 12#476fbc**CRUD successfully****\nShow notification    
else fail case     
     alt [fail]       
         return **Error occurred!**      
      endloop        
   endif    

Customer --> CustomerViewGamePage() {label="view_game_page"};   

@enduml
